verdict: FOREO's premium device uses unique T-Sonic pulsations and silicone touchpoints instead of bristles, reducing irritation while maximizing cleansing. Record-high review count (18,500) validates market-leading performance, though premium pricing exceeds budget category.

_research.name: FOREO Luna Mini 2 Compact Cleansing Device
_research.con: Luxury pricing significantly exceeds budget tier; replacement heads add ongoing costs.
